Field Description: Reset bit. Set to 1 to reset all registers to default. Self-clears.
Shunt voltage conversion time. Same encoding as VBUSCT.
Operating mode. 000=Power-down, 001=Shunt triggered, 010=Bus triggered, 011=Shunt+Bus triggered, 100=Power-down, 101=Shunt continuous, 110=Bus continuous, 111=Shunt+Bus continuous.
Shunt voltage data. Multiply by 2.5µV to get voltage in volts.
Bus voltage data. Multiply by 1.25mV to get voltage in volts.
Power data. Multiply by Power_LSB (= 25 × Current_LSB) to get power in watts.
Current data. Multiply by Current_LSB to get current in amperes.
Calibration value bits [15:1]. CAL = trunc(0.00512 / (Current_LSB × R_shunt)).
Alert Function Flag. Set when alert limit is exceeded.
Conversion Ready Flag. Set when conversion complete.
Math Overflow Flag. Set on arithmetic overflow in Current/Power.
Alert limit value. Compared to the register selected in Mask/Enable.
